overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a rural village at night. The character approaches a thatched-roof hut with a campfire, explores the immediate area, and continues down a dirt path into a forested region under a dark blue moonlit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path approaching a small settlement

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path toward a distant thatched-roof hut, with a wooden fence visible to the right

entered.detail: simple wooden post fence running alongside the path
narrow dirt trail winding through grassy meadows
traditional wooden hut with steep thatched roof becoming visible in the distance
open grassy fields with scattered wildflowers
dark tree line visible on the horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit rural landscape with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path. A wooden fence lines the right side of the path while open meadows stretch to the left. In the distance, a thatched-roof hut becomes progressively more visible as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: small rural settlement with thatched-roof hut and campfire

events.description: arriving at the hut area, transitioning from open path to settlement space
turning around the hut to explore the area near the campfire

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking around the hut, examining the area near the campfire and wooden cart before turning back

entered.detail: burning campfire casting warm orange light on the ground near the hut entrance
wooden wagon or cart parked near the hut
additional thatched structure visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt arrives at a small rural settlement dominated by a thatched-roof hut. A warm campfire burns near the entrance, contrasting with the cool moonlight. The character circles around the hut, passing a wooden cart, before preparing to continue down the path. The wooden fence from the approach falls behind as the settlement opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path transitioning from settlement back to open countryside

events.description: leaving the hut area behind and returning to the open path

agents.ego_description: Geralt leaving the settlement behind and continuing down the dirt path into the countryside

segments.scene_description: The character departs from the hut settlement, leaving the warm campfire glow behind. The path continues through open meadows with the thatched hut receding into the background. The environment transitions back to open countryside as Geralt moves away from the settlement structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with dense trees creating a corridor effect

events.description: entering denser forest area with trees closing in on both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking deeper into the forest along the winding dirt path, surrounded by dense trees

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming a dense wall along the left side of the path
thick forest vegetation closing in on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt journeying deeper into a densely forested region. The open meadows give way to a narrow trail enclosed by tall trees on both sides. The path becomes more winding as it penetrates the dark woods, with the sky increasingly obscured by the forest canopy overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit rural landscape through a small settlement and into a dense forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path lined by a wooden fence and open meadows, as a thatched-roof hut gradually emerges in the distance. As he arrives at the settlement, the cool moonlight shifts to the warm glow of a campfire near the hut's entrance, where the camera circles past a wooden cart before the fence falls away. The scene then opens back into the countryside as Geralt departs the settlement, leaving the flickering fire behind while the hut recedes into the background. Finally, the open meadows give way to a winding trail enclosed by tall trees, with the forest canopy increasingly obscuring the dark blue sky.
